scan_metadata.purpose: Venue refresh strategies, scraping playbooks, and categorization from prior ATL event list project

tier1_weekly_high_priority.name: Terminal West
tier1_weekly_high_priority.notes: Primary ticketing via AXS. Core of social calendar. High volume of electronic/indie music.

tier1_weekly_high_priority.name: The Eastern
tier1_weekly_high_priority.notes: Direct scraping via AXS. Verified venue preference. Electronic, indie, big gigantic style acts.

tier1_weekly_high_priority.name: Variety Playhouse
tier1_weekly_high_priority.notes: 403 Forbidden encountered. Pivot to third-party sources: concerts50.com, concertlands.com. High priority for downtempo electronic.

tier1_weekly_high_priority.name: The Masquerade
tier1_weekly_high_priority.scraping_method: Direct HTML parsing (minimal list view data)
tier1_weekly_high_priority.notes: Successfully fetched via webfetch. Multiple stages (Heaven, Hell, Purgatory, Altar). Enrichment requires individual event page visits.

tier1_weekly_high_priority.name: Believe Music Hall
tier1_weekly_high_priority.notes: Iris Presents partnership. Electronic/house music focus.

tier2_biweekly_culture_family.name: High Museum of Art
tier2_biweekly_culture_family.notes: Exhibitions & Jazz Fridays. Family-friendly. Intellectual enrichment focus.

tier2_biweekly_culture_family.name: Fernbank Museum
tier2_biweekly_culture_family.notes: After Dark events & Special Exhibits. Interactive family content. Verified data source recovered Jun-Aug 2026.

tier2_biweekly_culture_family.name: Atlanta Botanical Garden
tier2_biweekly_culture_family.notes: Seasonal events. Family adventure focused. Garden Lights immersive experience.

tier2_biweekly_culture_family.name: Georgia Aquarium
tier2_biweekly_culture_family.notes: Kids Free September events. 21+ Nights. Family-friendly. Verified data recovered Jun-Aug 2026.

tier2_biweekly_culture_family.name: Fox Theatre
tier2_biweekly_culture_family.scraping_method: Broadway Across America or direct HTML
tier2_biweekly_culture_family.notes: Broadway and series programming. Selective inclusion based on taste profile.

tier2_biweekly_culture_family.name: Center for Puppetry Arts
tier2_biweekly_culture_family.notes: Adult & family shows. Workshop programming. Interactive experiences for children.

tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.name: Dad's Garage
tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.notes: Improv and comedy. Family workshops available. Intellectual humor focus.

tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.name: Laughing Skull Lounge
tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.notes: Stand-up comedy venue. Observational/intellectual comedians preferred.

tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.name: Eddie's Attic
tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.notes: Acoustic and folk performances. Intimate venue. Date night friendly.

tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.name: Blind Willie's
tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.notes: Live blues venue. Jazz fusion acts. Intimate setting.

tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.name: The Earl
tier3_monthly_comedy_jazz_intimate.notes: Indie and rock programming. Also hosts DJ nights (dub/hip-hop/world music).
Experimental and indie programming. Underground music focus.

tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.name: 19hz.info
tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.notes: Underground electronic events. Best source for techno/house/dub. Verified active source.

tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.name: Resident Advisor (RA.co)
tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.scraping_method: RA.co Web Scraping or API (if available)
tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.notes: Club, techno, house, electronic culture. Global events with Atlanta filter.

tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.name: Songkick
tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.notes: Concert aggregator. Fallback for venues with 403 blocks. Multi-genre.

tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.name: Bandsintown
tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.notes: Artist-focused concert aggregator. Good for discovering artist tour dates.

tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.name: Plaza Theatre
tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.notes: Cult film screenings. Art/experimental films. Independent theater. Verified active.

tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.name: Lunchbox
tier4_discovery_underground_aggregators.notes: Underground electronic venue. Techno focus. May require manual discovery.

scraping_strategies.method: Direct AXS event calendar for Terminal West, The Eastern, Variety Playhouse
scraping_strategies.implementation: Search AXS.com by venue name, extract events matching date range
scraping_strategies.notes: Reliable. Handles dates, prices, ticket links, basic descriptions. No poster images in JSON API.

scraping_strategies.method: Search Eventbrite for District Atlanta events and promoters
scraping_strategies.implementation: Query Eventbrite by venue or promoter name, extract event JSON payload
scraping_strategies.notes: Eventbrite includes descriptions, images (og:image), and full details. Good poster source.

scraping_strategies.method: Ticketmaster backend for Iris Presents promotions (Believe Music Hall)
scraping_strategies.implementation: Search Ticketmaster by promoter/venue, parse event listing
scraping_strategies.notes: Reliable. Ticketmaster has robust event data and images.

scraping_strategies.implementation: Use webfetch to retrieve events page, parse HTML table or listing, extract event names and dates
scraping_strategies.notes: Successfully extracted event names, dates, venue stages. Requires follow-up visit to individual event pages for rich descriptions and images.

scraping_strategies.fallback: Pivot to third-party concert aggregators: concerts50.com, concertlands.com, Songkick, Bandsintown
scraping_strategies.notes: Block appears to be anti-bot protection. Third-party sources have historical data.

scraping_strategies.method: Direct HTML table parsing from eventlisting_Atlanta.php
scraping_strategies.implementation: Parse HTML table, extract event name, date, venue, price, link
scraping_strategies.notes: Best source for underground electronic/techno/house/dub. Actively curated. High-quality venue data.

scraping_strategies.method: Web scraping or API (check RA.co terms)
scraping_strategies.implementation: Filter by Atlanta, parse event listings with date range
scraping_strategies.notes: Global club/electronic culture database. May have API restrictions. Web scraping may be viable.

scraping_strategies.method: Aggregator search for venue name or artist
scraping_strategies.implementation: Search aggregator by venue or promoter name, extract events
scraping_strategies.notes: Works when direct venue scraping is blocked. Less detailed than direct sources but reliable.
scraping_strategies.use_case: Fallback for Variety Playhouse and similar blocked venues

scraping_strategies.implementation: Search venue name on Facebook, retrieve public event listing
scraping_strategies.notes: Useful for underground/smaller venues. May include images and descriptions.

scraping_strategies.method: og:image tag extraction from ticket link pages
scraping_strategies.implementation: Fetch poster URL from Eventbrite/AXS/Ticketmaster event page og:image meta tag
scraping_strategies.notes: Fallback strategy if event poster not found in direct scrape. Requires secondary HTTP request.

scraping_strategies.implementation: Visit official venue websites, collect logo_url, primary_color (hex), font_family. Log to venue_branding.json
scraping_strategies.notes: High-res PNG/SVG preferred. Verified URLs from official CDNs. Populated for 11 top venues.

file_1_sheet1.use_case: Recurring family activities, weekday programming, free/low-cost options

file_2_expanded.type: Curated Event List with Personal Scoring

interest_score_mapping.9_10: Perfect match - Dima's taste profile (downtempo, world fusion, ambient)
interest_score_mapping.7_8: Good fit - Electronic/indie with strong appeal
interest_score_mapping.6: Decent option - Secondary interest or experimental

sample_high_score_events.reason: Perfect match - downtempo electronic, attended venue, setlist history provided
World fusion electronic with belly dance, matches world music + electronic taste
Ambient electronic perfection, road trip venue, instrumental, gorgeous visuals
Dub/hip-hop/world music fusion - perfect genre combination

file_3_aug_oct.path: Archive/2025-11-12-original-export/ATL Event List 2025 - ATL Events Aug-Oct.csv

enrichment_features.descriptions: Rich marketing copy with setlist history, timing info, artist comparison, recent tour data
enrichment_features.timing_details: Doors, show start time, expected duration, stage count (for multi-stage venues)
enrichment_features.artist_links: Spotify link column for music integration
enrichment_features.family_context: Family_Level column for filtering family vs 18+/21+ events
enrichment_features.personalization: Notes reference Dima's taste profile and venue attendance history

batch_a_big_three_electronic.reason: Core of social calendar, high volume of relevant events, reliable scraping sources
workflow: Reconnaissance: Identify events/calendar page, check HTML structure
Enrichment: Add descriptions, Spotify links, interest scores, images
Logging: Record technical method in SCRAPING_TECHNICAL_LOG.md

batch_b_culture_museums_family.reason: Daytime activities, intellectual enrichment, family planning
workflow: Seasonal event filtering (e.g., Garden Lights, Kids Free September)

batch_c_comedy_jazz_intimate.reason: Date nights, unique experiences, curated taste match
workflow: Direct HTML or Facebook event scraping
Fallback to Songkick/Bandsintown for blocked venues
Rich description enrichment (tone, vibe, comparable artists)
Link collection (ticket platforms vary by venue)

batch_d_discovery_underground.reason: Finding hidden gems, expanded genres, gap filling
workflow: RA.co API or web scraping (check terms)

taste_matcher_workflow.input: Raw event data from scraping (marketing copy, artist name, venue, date, price)

process.action: Batch events for LLM enrichment, group by category
Use taste_matcher_v2.py CLI to generate enriched descriptions
Rewrite descriptions with Dima's TASTE_PROFILE.md context
Generate interest_score (1-5) based on genre/artist affinity

event_posters.method: Extract image_url during scrape, fallback to og:image from ticket page
event_posters.automation: fetch_assets.py downloads batch to prevent agent timeouts

403_forbidden_strategy.step_1: Log the blocking venue and URL to MANUAL_BROWSER_TASKS.md
403_forbidden_strategy.step_2_pivot_1: Search Songkick or Bandsintown for venue/artist events
403_forbidden_strategy.step_3_fail: If still inaccessible, flag for manual browser agent review
403_forbidden_strategy.rule: Do NOT hallucinate data. Log it for later manual collection.

missing_poster_images.step_1: Check event JSON API payload for image field
missing_poster_images.step_2: Fallback to og:image from ticket link page

minimal_description_data.example: The Masquerade list view provides minimal details
minimal_description_data.solution: Require follow-up visit to individual event pages for enrichment
minimal_description_data.implementation: Secondary scraping pass after initial list extraction

best_performing_sources: AXS event calendar (Terminal West, The Eastern, Variety Playhouse)
Direct HTML scraping (The Masquerade, museums, venues with public calendars)
blocked_sources: Variety Playhouse (403 Forbidden) — use concert aggregators as fallback
most_valuable_enrichment: Setlist history (from setlist.fm or artist pages)
Timing details (door times, show duration, stage count)

venue_refresh_frequency.tier_1_weekly: Terminal West, The Eastern (daily/weekly updates via AXS)
